description: Legal document. In the hand of Ḥalfon b. Menashshe (fl. 1100–1138 CE). Fragment (lower right piece). Likely the will of a certain Shemuel. Mentions his cousins (banū ʿamm), his sister, and many other names including [...] b. Yehuda, Shemarya b. Y[...], Meʾir, Yaʿqūb, and Yisr[aʾel?].
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
